name: Swing365 Lincoln North
about: Swing365 Lincoln North is a membership-based golf simulator venue offering state-of-the-art simulator technology in a private club atmosphere. The facility provides 24/7 access to individual suites for golf practice and play, with bookings available online. The venue focuses on creating a welcoming environment where members can enjoy golf at their convenience, featuring Full Swing simulators with advanced ball tracking technology. The club operates on a membership model with limited spots available, emphasizing exclusive access and personalized experiences.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Full Swing simulator technology with real-time ball tracking
Private, membership-based environment for exclusive use
Multiple course options and practice capabilities

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB/Food allowed - members can bring their own food and beverages
BYOB allowed - members can bring their own alcoholic beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: 688 infrared sensors across two tracks for mid-flight ball measurement at speed of light

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOB/Food is allowed - members can bring their own food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard simulator sessions are 60 minutes per hour, with some membership levels offering unlimited time up to 90-120 minutes per day.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendly policies or activities is available.
